nasb.text: I have seen all the works which have been done under the sun, and behold, all is vanity and striving after wind.

esv.text: I have seen everything that is done under the sun, and behold, all is vanity and a striving after wind.

cnv.text: 我看過日光之下所發生的一切事，不料，一切都是虛空，都是捕風。

ccb.text: 我观察一切日光之下所做的事，看啊，都是虚空，好像捕风。

csbs.text: 我见过在日光之下所做的一切事，看哪，全是虚空，全是捕风！
